target_flow: Read, compose, reply, search, navigate Outlook O365 desktop app
architecture_note: Outlook O365 (olk.exe) is a WebView2 wrapper. The parent process (olk.exe) exposes only 8 elements — the outer chrome. The actual UI (inbox, compose, ribbon, folders) is rendered by a CHILD msedgewebview2.exe process. You MUST use FindAll(TrueCondition) or RawViewWalker from the parent window to cross the process boundary and see all 395+ inner elements.

pid_resolution.strategy: Connect to olk.exe PID. Use deep_query or spatial_map which walk from the parent window — they automatically cross into the WebView2 child process. Do NOT connect to msedgewebview2.exe directly — there are 50+ of those processes and most are not the Outlook renderer.
pid_resolution.shallow_enumerate_warning: The standard UI tree (desktop_ui_tree, desktop_find_elements) will only return 8 elements. You MUST use desktop_spatial_map or desktop_deep_query to see the full UI.

navigation_plan.note: Returns 395+ elements including all inner WebView2 content
Key UI sections: left-rail-appbar (Mail/Calendar/People), Navigation pane (folders), Ribbon (Home/View/Help), Message list, Reading pane, Copilot panel

compose.note: Opens compose window. After clicking, spatial_map again to see the To/CC/Subject/Body fields.

search.element: Search for email, meetings, files and more.
search.note: Click to focus, then type search query

folders.note: Each folder is a TreeItem. Invoke to navigate to it.

email_list.note: Each email is a ListItem with sender, subject, time. Has Mark as read, Select checkbox, Expand conversation buttons.

tabs.note: Switch between Focused and Other inbox tabs

app_switcher.note: Left rail app buttons to switch between Outlook modules

copilot.note: Copilot chat panel — can compose emails, summarize, etc.

read_email.method: Click a ListItem in the message list. The reading pane updates. Use spatial_map to read the email content from the reading pane elements.
read_email.copy_method: Select text in reading pane via Ctrl+A, Ctrl+C

steps: spatial_map to find To, CC, Subject, Body fields

known_issues: Parent olk.exe only exposes 8 elements — MUST use deep_query/spatial_map for full UI
50+ msedgewebview2 processes — do NOT try to connect to them individually
Calendar view is a separate module — invoke Calendar button in left rail to switch
Copilot panel may or may not be open — check spatial_map for 'Message Copilot' edit field
